title: dianthus canescens
intro: Dianthus canescens, also known as the gray pink flower or fringed pink, is a species of flowering plant in the carnation family. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Dianthus canescens include its potential to alleviate digestive issues, reduce fever, and soothe skin irritations. Herbal preparations of Dianthus canescens may include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
